name: Remove Background and Generate Product Card

parameters.content:
## Remove Background and Generate Product Card

E-commerce sellers and marketplace teams take a raw product photo, remove the background to get a clean cutout, then compose it into a branded listing card with the product name, price, and brand — ready for Amazon, Shopify, or social media.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Remove Background
Resource: **Image Transformation**

Configure the Image Transformation parameters below, then connect your credentials.

### Step 2: Generate Product Card
Resource: **Image Generation**

Configure the Image Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.layersJson:
[
  {
    "index": 0,
    "type": "solid-color",
    "hex_color": "#F5F5F5"
  },
  {
    "index": 1,
    "type": "solid-color",
    "hex_color": "#FFFFFF",
    "position": { "x": 30, "y": 30 },
    "dimensions": { "width": 840, "height": 840 },
    "border_radius": 12
  },
  {
    "index": 2,
    "type": "image",
    "file": {
      "type": "base64",
      "name": "product-clean.png",
      "base64": "<buffer from step 1>"
    },
    "position": { "x": 150, "y": 80 },
    "dimensions": { "width": 600, "height": 600 }
  },
  {
    "index": 3,
    "type": "text",
    "text": "CRAFTWELL GOODS",
    "font_name": "Inter",
    "font_size_in_px": 12,
    "font_weight": "regular",
    "text_color": "#94A3B8",
    "text_align": "left",
    "vertical_align": "center",
    "position": { "x": 48, "y": 718 },
    "dimensions": { "width": 500, "height": 20 }
  },
  {
    "index": 4,
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Full-Grain Leather Bifold Wallet",
    "font_name": "Inter",
    "font_size_in_px": 22,
    "font_weight": "bold",
    "text_color": "#0F172A",
    "text_align": "left",
    "vertical_align": "center",
    "position": { "x": 48, "y": 746 },
    "dimensions": { "width": 600, "height": 36 }
  },
  {
    "index": 5,
    "type": "text",
    "text": "$89.00",
    "font_name": "Inter",
    "font_size_in_px": 28,
    "font_weight": "bold",
    "text_color": "#B45309",
    "text_align": "left",
    "vertical_align": "center",
    "position": { "x": 48, "y": 790 },
    "dimensions": { "width": 300, "height": 44 }
  }
]
